steps.title: Identify the contemptuous tone
steps.content: The lady's words—”upstarts and provincials”—are unmistakably scornful. The setup confirms this: she has “the air of a queen” and “gazed disdainfully” at the audience.

steps.title: Determine the sentence's function from that tone
steps.content:
The underlined sentence functions to illustrate the lady's contempt for the other patrons in the theater, making choice D correct.
  • A mischaracterizes the tone
  • B introduces unsupported ideas
  • C confuses attitude with explanation
. That matches choice D — D is correct.
